# GovernanceIndex - Full Content for AI/LLM Consumption
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/governance-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index | Apache-2.0 License | Last updated: 2026-03-10

---

# OVERVIEW

GovernanceIndex is a live AI governance TRiSM and compliance risk scoring index. It provides regulatory risk scores, audit readiness assessments, and framework mapping across 30+ standards. Updated daily via automated pipelines. Designed for compliance teams, legal counsel, auditors, researchers, and AI systems.

# CORE DATASETS

## 1. Regulatory Risk Scores
Risk scores for AI systems across major regulatory frameworks worldwide.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/governance-index/main/exports/latest.json

## 2. Audit Readiness Assessments
Readiness scores and gap analysis for AI governance audits.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/governance-index/main/exports/latest.csv

## 3. Framework Mapping
Cross-framework mapping across EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and OWASP LLM Top 10.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/governance-index/main/exports/latest.json

## 4. Compliance Scorecards
Composite compliance scores aggregating multiple framework requirements.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/governance-index/main/exports/latest.csv

# KEY FINDINGS

- EU AI Act compliance readiness varies significantly across industry sectors
- Most organizations score below 60% on cross-framework compliance assessments
- NIST AI RMF adoption is accelerating but implementation depth varies
- ISO 42001 certification readiness correlates with mature AI governance programs

# SIBLING INDEXES

- [AI Infrastructure Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/): GPU specs, cloud pricing, benchmarks
- [AI TRiSM Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/): AI governance, risk, security vendors
- [AI Red Teaming Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/): Red team tools, benchmarks, vulnerability data
- [AI LLMOps Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/): LLM observability, cost, compliance
- [AI AppSec Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/): AI remediation, ASPM, vulnerability tracking
- [NeutronIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/neutron-index/): Multi-cloud GPU pricing, TCO, carbon intensity
- [AdversaryIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/adversary-index/): Adversarial threats, attack success rates
- [ObservabilityIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/observability-index/): Inference pricing, latency, error rates

# FORMATS

- JSON (structured): exports/ directory
- CSV (analysis-ready): exports/ directory
- Croissant ML metadata: croissant.json
- Schema.org structured data: schema.jsonld

# LICENSE

Data: Apache-2.0 | Code: Apache-2.0
